title: En ven i bolignøden
writer: Peer Guldbrandsen, Bent From, Ida From
actors: Birgit Sadolin, Ebbe Langberg, Morten Grunwald
plot: 7 people renting rooms in the same house get 2 weeks notice. It's impossible to find accommodation, especially for singles. One goes to the Ministry of Housing to complain and ends up as the minister's secretary. Changes follow.
